sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23336" key="dala/gxan" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαλάγχαν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θάλασσαν</foreign> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maced.</author> </bibl>), Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δάλεμον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κηδεμόνα,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
